input.command:
cat > /tmp/final_verify.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "✅ Updated Chain Logos (DeFi Llama - Latest Branding)"
echo ""
echo "Chain Logos:"
echo "  Ethereum:  https://icons.llamao.fi/icons/chains/rsz_ethereum.jpg"
echo "  Base:      https://icons.llamao.fi/icons/chains/rsz_base.jpg (NEW ✨)"
echo "  Arbitrum:  https://icons.llamao.fi/icons/chains/rsz_arbitrum.jpg"
echo "  Polygon:   https://icons.llamao.fi/icons/chains/rsz_polygon.jpg"
echo "  Optimism:  https://icons.llamao.fi/icons/chains/rsz_optimism.jpg"

echo ""
echo "Testing new Base logo:"
curl -sI "https://icons.llamao.fi/icons/chains/rsz_base.jpg" | grep -E "HTTP|content-type"

echo ""
echo "✅ Base logo updated to latest branding from DeFi Llama"
echo "✅ All chain logos are HTTPS and Farcaster-compliant"
EOF

chmod +x /tmp/final_verify.sh
/tmp/final_verify.sh
